tasks.label: DPF: Production Build
args: pnpm --filter @dpf/db exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter web build

tasks.label: DPF: Dev Infrastructure
args: docker compose up -d postgres neo4j qdrant portal-init sandbox
tasks.detail: Start databases + sandbox only (for local pnpm dev)

tasks.label: DPF: Start
tasks.detail: Start full Docker stack including portal

tasks.label: DPF: Restart
args: docker compose down && docker compose up -d

tasks.label: DPF: Rebuild Portal
args: docker compose build portal portal-init && docker compose up -d portal-init && docker compose up -d portal
tasks.detail: Rebuild portal image from source and restart (includes migrations)

tasks.label: DPF: Rebuild All
args: docker compose build && docker compose up -d
tasks.detail: Rebuild all images and restart full stack

tasks.label: DPF: Publish Release
tasks.command: $latest = git tag --sort=-version:refname | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Host "Last release: $latest" -ForegroundColor Cyan; $tag = Read-Host 'Enter version tag'; if (-not $tag) { Write-Host 'No tag entered'; exit 1 }; git tag $tag; git push origin main; git push origin $tag; Write-Host "Published $tag to GHCR" -ForegroundColor Green
